violations.description: View toggle controls (grid/list) are <div> elements with no button role or keyboard accessibility. The active state is only conveyed visually.
violations.reference_fix:
<button class="active" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Grid view">⊞</button>
<button aria-pressed="false" aria-label="List view">☰</button>

violations.description: Contact action links (✉️, 📞, 💬) use only emoji with no aria-label. Screen readers cannot determine whether the link is email, phone, or chat, or which employee it refers to.
violations.reference_fix: ✉️ 📞

violations.description: Search input in header has no associated <label> element or aria-label. Only placeholder text is used.
Sidebar with department and location links is a generic <div> without <nav> or role='navigation', preventing screen readers from identifying it as navigation.
Pagination links are not wrapped in a <nav> element with appropriate aria-label. The active page link has no aria-current='page' attribute.

page_description: An HR employee directory with sidebar filters, search, view toggle, employee cards with emoji contact buttons, and pagination. Issues across navigation landmarks, toggle buttons, contact link labels, search label, and pagination.
